description: CompositionBlack mesh T-shirt made of 100% recycled polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the front and on the side seam on the left backFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not use softeners, bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryRun better for longer in this black T-shirt from nike. The mesh Dri-Fit fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you cool and comfortable, while the sporty design with word "Fast" printed in bold graphic lettering on the front inspires you to do just that. Team this T-shirt with track pants and running shoes.
